fact_lookup_entity_by_id.cypher: MATCH (n {id: $entityId}) WHERE any(label IN labels(n) WHERE label IN $allowedLabels) RETURN n, labels(n) AS entityLabels

impact_analysis_from_entity.cypher: MATCH (source {id: $entityId}) WHERE any(label IN labels(source) WHERE label IN $sourceLabels) MATCH path = (source)-[*1..5]-(affected) WHERE length(path) <= $maxDepth AND all(rel IN relationships(path) WHERE type(rel) IN $allowedRelationshipTypes) AND any(label IN labels(affected) WHERE label IN $targetLabels) AND source <> affected RETURN affected, labels(affected) AS entityLabels, min(length(path)) AS distance

dependency_traversal_paths.cypher: MATCH (source {id: $entityId}) WHERE any(label IN labels(source) WHERE label IN $sourceLabels) MATCH path = (source)-[*1..5]-(neighbor) WHERE length(path) <= $maxDepth AND all(rel IN relationships(path) WHERE type(rel) IN $allowedRelationshipTypes) AND any(label IN labels(neighbor) WHERE label IN $targetLabels) AND source <> neighbor RETURN DISTINCT path
